name: verify_place_zone
description: Verify whether an object is within the requested placement zone tolerance.

parameters.side: Required. left or right, used for result metadata.
parameters.object_x/object_y/object_z: Object position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.object_body: Optional MuJoCo body name used instead of explicit object position.
parameters.object_site: Optional MuJoCo site name used instead of explicit object position.
parameters.object_geom: Optional MuJoCo geom name used instead of explicit object position.
parameters.place_x/place_y/place_z: Target placement zone center in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.max_xy_error: Required maximum allowed horizontal distance from zone center.
parameters.max_z_error: Required maximum allowed vertical distance from zone center.
